MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WESTCORE MONTGOMERY, LLC, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT and summary adjudication of issues. Jeffrey N. Brown, Esq. of Pircher, Nichols & Meeks, (310) 201-8990 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Andrew Giacomini, Esq. of Hanson Bridgett (415) 777-3200, appearing for Defendant/Cross Complainant and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied for reasons set forth in Court's ruling on Wells Fargo's motion for summary judgment. Further, motion denied for 3 percent rental increase for the extension period. This request is not based on any term or provision in the lease.
